signUp.title: Create account
signUp.subtitle: Your first tournament, in five minutes
signUp.checkEmail: We've sent an email to {{email}}. Open it to confirm your account.

error.invalidCredentials: That email or password isn't right.
error.emailNotConfirmed: Confirm your email before signing in. Check your inbox.
error.weakPassword: Your password needs at least 8 characters.
error.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists. Sign in instead.
error.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a minute and try again.
error.network: No connection to the server. Check your network and try again.
error.unknown: We couldn't complete that. Try again.
